itemReviewed.name: Chennai Public School - TVS Colony,Anna Nagar

address.streetAddress: TVS Ave, Radial Nagar, Anna Nagar West Extension, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600101, India

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Badly Organised Senior Secondary!

From class 11, you'll have entered hell in the same school you thought of as heaven. The school prioritizes FITJEE students and abandons others. The best faculty are directed towards FITJEE classes and others thrown off to non- FITJEE classes.

I'm a non fitjee student and the physics teacher I have is so fast and unclear that I couldn't understand a thing  she's saying. She is so egoistic and bad tempered, students don't even like her. For security reasons, I won't disclose her name but she really should improve her teaching skills.

If you're a non fitjee student, one word can describe your 11th and 12th experience: HELL

itemReviewed.name: Chennai Public School - TVS Colony,Anna Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Hello everyone,
The annual day was excellent and adorable talent kids made the day in fabulous on stage...I was impressed in all of the kids and teachers ,management the event was colorful and phenomenal  performed by kids and teachers...well organized....hatsoff to all teachers who given full efforts and managed the event....The speech given by the principal about the curriculum was excellent and the graduation of kids 👏 individuals talents  explained by class teacher it was too Good 👍 👏 personally enjoyed the whole program ❤️

itemReviewed.name: Chennai Public School - TVS Colony,Anna Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I had been to CPS’s sports day recently & it was a lovely event. Kudos to the teachers and non teaching staffs for organising & handling the event well… The March past and the Pyramid formation were the highlights of the day….

Cheers to the children for making the Sports day even more prettier.

itemReviewed.name: Chennai Public School - TVS Colony,Anna Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Recently we had our Annual sports meet..! I take pride in applauding the commendable efforts taken by the school management and teachers in giving rigorous practice to the children.. so many sporting events took place which the students and parents received with cheer and excitement from the gallery... The efforts the teachers had taken in selecting costumes for each of the cultural events that was showcased was amazing!! Every piece that was done by the children was impeccable.. kudos to each and every student and all the teachers and supporting staff.
--
Proud CPS parent

itemReviewed.name: Chennai Public School - TVS Colony,Anna Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: hello CPS, please clear children pickup path by parking bikes elsewhere and have staffs to  streamline the crowd. daily we are stuck for more than 15 minutes in this chaos to receive our children in hot sun. hope this is addressed immediately.
